"children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "If your register goes offline, you will lose the ability to make payments through Tyro until your register comes back online."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "If your terminal is having difficulty connecting to the internet, this can also result in Maropost POS not being able For example, on Yoximo terminals "}, {"text": "Menu", "bold": true}, {"text": " > "}, {"text": "Configuration", "bold": true}, {"text": " > "}, {"text": "Surcharging", "bold": true}, {"text": " > "}, {"text": "Enable/Disable", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "You can now set your surcharge amounts on your Tyro terminal."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "Troubleshooting"}], "data-id": "troubleshooting"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The integration between Maropost POS and your Tyro terminal requires an active internet connection. If your register goes offline, you will lose the ability to make payments through Tyro until your register comes back online. If your register is online and you are still experiencing issues, Tyro support may request logs to assist with diagnosis of the problem.
